title: Youtube Poop: Don't Floppy That Copy
description:
Or else.....!

I saw the source and immediately began pooping this. It's too perfect. This is more a deviation from my usual style, but I've kept some old elements in there. Gotta love that Tetris "fail" remix.

To read the (edited) blue screen of death, view in high quality and full screen.

Moral of the story: Copy that floppy and you'll get dead. You dig?
